reasoning: Today's session directly targets the lactate clearance limiter identified in your power profile. Your last ride showed solid pacing but we need to push your fatigue resistance to handle the demands of the Alpine Loop's climb. Focusing on sweet spot over-unders will help develop the necessary aerobic base and stamina.

suggested_sets.name: Main Set
suggested_sets.description: 4 sets of 8-minute over-unders: 5min at 209-223W, then 3min at 242-256W, with 2 minutes easy spinning between sets.

weekly_focus: This week: progressive loading — keep attacking the lactate clearance gap.
